business.name: Reading Pest Removals
business.tagline: Fast wasp nest removal — same day service

hero.headline: Wasp nest? *Gone in an hour*
hero.subheadline: Reading's go-to team for fast, fuss-free pest removal. We show up the same day.

services_section.label: WHAT WE HANDLE
services_section.heading: Every pest problem, sorted
services_section.subheading: From wasp nests to unwanted visitors — we handle it all

services.title: Wasp Nest Removal
services.description: Safe, professional removal of wasp nests from sheds, eaves, and hard-to-reach spots. No fuss, just results.

services.title: Same-Day Service
services.description: Call us today, sorted today. Most jobs completed within an hour of arrival.

services.title: Bee & Hornet Control
services.description: Expert removal of bee swarms and aggressive hornet colonies with proper safety equipment.

services.title: General Pest Control
services.description: Ants, spiders, and other unwanted pests handled with targeted treatments that work.

about.heading: Real people, real results
about.body: We're a Reading pest control team that shows up when we say we will. One call gets the job done — no long contracts or hidden fees.

reviews.name: Chris P.
reviews.text: Called Martin out twice for wasp nest removal. Both times he came same day and sorted it without any fuss. Friendly, reliable, good value.

reviews.name: Ryan K.
reviews.text: Very fast! Wasp nest sorted in less than an hour from calling to finishing up.

reviews.name: Mad M.
reviews.text: Great fast, polite, efficient service. No more wasp nest! Reasonably priced and able to pay by card.

service_areas.label: COVERAGE AREA
service_areas.heading: Serving Reading & surrounding areas
service_areas.subheading: Fast response times across Berks County

cta.heading: Wasp problem? We'll sort it today
cta.body: Call now for same-day service. Most jobs done within an hour. Card payments accepted on-site.
